_README: Sample configuration for the send-email skill.
Copy the keys below into your runtime secrets file -- the path in AAS_SECRETS_FILE,
Use the single 'smtp' block for one account, OR the 'accounts' map for several
(select at send time with --account NAME). If both are present, an account wins:
resolution is --account / SMTP_ACCOUNT > default_account > the 'smtp' block.
Only 'user' and 'password' are sensitive; prefer a provider app password, not your
login password. Every identity field (from_name, reply_to, cc, bcc, signature,
signature_html, reply_to_self, bcc_self) is optional. This file is a template and
is never read by the skill; the '_README' key is ignored if you copy it across.
Each field can also be set per send on the CLI or via env vars (SMTP_HOST, etc.).
Optional PGP/MIME signing: set 'pgp_sign': true and (optionally) 'pgp_key' on an
account; needs gpg on PATH with your secret key. Sign one message with --sign.
